news.t: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Materials (SMN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Materials Select Sector index. The fund provides -200% exposure to a market-cap-weighted index that measures the performance of companies involved in the production of certain metals, chemicals and paper products. SMN was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...
